title: Flanksource runtime properties
description: Runtime properties consumed by duty and related Flanksource services. Values are stored as strings in .properties files and the database, but this schema also accepts native JSON booleans and numbers for JSON/YAML authoring.

access.log.description: Enable HTTP access logging in incident-commander.

access.log.colors.description: Enable colors in detailed access logs.

access.log.debug.description: Enable debug logging for access log middleware.

access.log.request.body.description: Include request bodies in access logs.

access.log.request.body.max.description: Maximum request body bytes captured by access logs.

access.log.request.header.description: Include request headers in access logs.

access.log.request.id.description: Include request IDs in access logs.

access.log.response.body.description: Include response bodies in access logs.

access.log.response.body.max.description: Maximum response body bytes captured by access logs.

access.log.spanId.description: Include span IDs in access logs.

access.log.traceId.description: Include trace IDs in access logs.

access.log.userAgent.description: Include user-agent values in access logs.

access_token.default_expiry.description: Default expiry for generated access tokens.

agents.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable agent UI surfaces.

ai.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable AI UI surfaces.

applications.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable application UI surfaces.

artifacts.connection.description: Connection URL for external artifact/blob storage. Empty uses inline DB-backed storage.

artifacts.max_read_size.description: Maximum artifact bytes read for incident-commander artifact responses. Set <= 0 to disable the guard.

auth.impersonation.description: Set to false/off to disable scope impersonation.

azuredevops.pipeline.max_age.description: Maximum Azure DevOps pipeline run age to scrape.

azuredevops.terminal_cache.ttl.description: Azure DevOps terminal status cache TTL.

casbin.explain.description: Use Casbin EnforceEx and log matched rules.

change_retention.delete_batch_size.description: Batch size for config change retention deletes.

checks.kubernetesResource.maxResources.description: Maximum total Kubernetes resources allowed in a Kubernetes resource check.

components.delete_batch_size.description: Batch size for component deletion during topology sync.

config.retention.period.description: Retention period for deleted config items.

config.retention.stale_item_age.description: Age after which stale config items are soft deleted.

config.traversal.cache_expiry.max.description: Maximum randomized expiry for config traversal cache entries.

config.traversal.cache_expiry.min.description: Minimum randomized expiry for config traversal cache entries.

config.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable config UI surfaces.

config_analysis.retention.max_age.description: Age after which stale config analyses are marked resolved.

config_analysis.set_status_closed_days.description: Days after which resolved config analyses are closed.

config_scraper.retention.period.description: Retention period for deleted config scraper records.

dashboard.default.view.description: Default dashboard view name or namespace/name.

defaults.dashboard_view.description: UI sidebar dashboard view selector. Value may be a view UUID, name, or namespace/name.

db.connection.timeout.description: Statement timeout applied to the application DB user role.

db.log.level.description: Update the db logger level through the commons logger property listener.

db.postgrest.timeout.description: Statement timeout applied to PostgREST DB roles.

diff.rust-gen.description: Use the alternate diff implementation when available.

envvar.cache.timeout.description: Cache TTL for Kubernetes Secret and ConfigMap env var lookups.

envvar.helm.cache.timeout.description: Cache TTL for Helm release value lookups.

envvar.lookup.log.description: Log resolved env var lookup values when logger verbosity is high enough.

envvar.lookup.timeout.description: Timeout for resolving an EnvVar from Kubernetes sources.

event_queue.maxAge.description: Maximum age for event_queue rows before cleanup.

events.audit.size.description: Number of recent events retained in audit rings.

external.cache.timeout.description: External entity cache timeout in config-db.

har.captureContentTypes.description: Comma-separated content types eligible for HAR body capture.

har.maxBodySize.description: Maximum HAR body capture size in bytes.

health.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable health UI surfaces. Also disables settings.health and settings.job_history.

http.body.disabled.description: Disable HTTP body capture in commons HTTP trace middleware.

http.har.location.description: Directory where canary-checker writes HAR files.

http.headers.disabled.description: Disable HTTP header capture in commons HTTP trace middleware.

http.log.response.body.length.description: Maximum logged HTTP response body length.

flanksource.ui.snippets.description: Local UI snippet value. The UI executes local-source values as a JavaScript function expression once a user is loaded, passing { user, organization }.

incidents.disable.description: Disable incident notification behavior in incident-commander; also a UI feature flag when the value is the string true.

incremental_scrape_event.lag_threshold.description: Slow-event threshold for incremental scrape event logging.

job.ResetIsPushed.ignore_deleted_at.description: Do not add deleted_at IS NULL during reset-is-pushed queries.

job.ResetIsPushed.interval_days.description: Lookback window in days for resetting is_pushed.

job.eviction.period.description: Sleep period for job-history eviction when no eviction IDs are queued.

job.history.agentItemsToRetain.description: Agent job-history entries to retain per status grouping.

job.history.maxAge.description: Maximum job history age before cleanup.

job.history.running.maxAge.description: Maximum running job age before marking stale.

job.jitter.disable.description: Disable schedule jitter for periodic jobs.

job_history.agent_cleanup.batch_size.description: Batch size for stale agent job-history cleanup.

kubernetes.cache.timeout.description: Kubernetes discovery cache timeout for the REST mapper.

kubernetes.rbac_config_access.description: Enable config access generation from Kubernetes RBAC.

log.caller.description: Add source caller information to logs.

log.db.params.description: Log SQL parameters when DB trace logging is enabled.

log.kubeproxy.description: Enable kube proxy logging in incident-commander.

log.level.description: Root logger level and effective context observability floor.

log.level.resourceSelector.description: Enable resource selector SQL logging when set.

log.report.caller.description: Alias used by logger.Configure for caller reporting.

logs.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable log UI surfaces.

mcp.template.max-length.description: Maximum MCP template size in bytes.

memory.stats.description: When positive, periodically log memory stats on the debug server.

metrics.checks.labels.description: Comma-separated check label include/exclude patterns for metrics.

metrics.config_items.cache_ttl.description: Prometheus config item collector cache TTL.

metrics.disable.description: Comma-separated metric names to disable; '*' disables all supported metrics.

notifications.error_reset_duration.description: How long before notification errors can be reset.

notifications.labels.order.description: Override default display ordering for selected labels.

playbook.runner.longpoll.timeout.description: Long-poll timeout for remote playbook runners.

playbooks.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable playbook UI surfaces.

proxy.disable.description: UI Clerk direct-backend toggle. When true, the UI bypasses the proxy and points API clients at the organization's backend_url.

pubsub.max_messages.description: Maximum Pub/Sub messages read by a canary check.

query.log.description: Log resource selector and query logger output at normal verbosity.

response.strip_upstream_cors.description: Strip upstream CORS headers in incident-commander proxy responses.

rls.disable.description: Disable RLS in incident-commander startup checks.

s3.list.max-objects.description: Maximum S3 objects listed by folder checks.

scraper.aws.trusted_advisor.minInterval.description: Minimum interval between AWS Trusted Advisor scrapes.

scraper.diff.timer.minSize.description: Minimum config size before logging diff memory timing at high verbosity.

scraper.log.items.description: Log config scraper item processing details.

scraper.scraper.label.missing.description: Log missing scraper label extraction; this is the effective key produced by ScrapeContext.PropertyOn("scraper.label.missing").

scraper.scraper.tag.missing.description: Log missing scraper tag extraction; this is the effective key produced by ScrapeContext.PropertyOn("scraper.tag.missing").

scrapers.default.schedule.description: Default schedule for scrape configs without an explicit schedule.

scrapers.githubactions.concurrency.description: GitHub Actions API request concurrency per repository.

scrapers.githubactions.maxAge.description: Maximum age for GitHub Actions workflow runs.

settings.artifacts.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable artifact settings UI surfaces.

settings.config_scraper.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable config scraper settings UI surfaces. Also disabled when config.disable is true.

settings.connections.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable connection settings UI surfaces.

settings.event_queue_status.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable event queue status settings UI surfaces.

settings.feature_flags.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable feature flag settings UI surfaces.

settings.health.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable health settings UI surfaces. Also disabled when health.disable is true.

settings.integrations.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable integration settings UI surfaces.

settings.job_history.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable job history settings UI surfaces. Also disabled when health.disable is true.

settings.logging_backends.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable logging backend settings UI surfaces.

settings.notifications.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable notification settings UI surfaces.

settings.organization_profile.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable organization profile settings UI surfaces.

settings.permissions.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable permission settings UI surfaces.

settings.playbooks.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable playbook settings UI surfaces.

settings.rules.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable rules settings UI surfaces.

settings.teams.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable team settings UI surfaces.

settings.topology.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable topology settings UI surfaces. Also disabled when topology.disable is true.

settings.user.disabled.description: Set by auth middleware when the current user is disabled.

settings.users.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable user settings UI surfaces.

shell.allowed.envs.description: Additional environment variable names passed through to shell executions.

shell.connection.wait_before_cleanup.description: Wait before cleaning up shell connection artifacts.

slack.max-url-length.description: Maximum Slack URL length before shortening. Values above 3000 are ignored by code.

topology.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable topology UI surfaces. Also disables settings.topology.

topology.query.timeout.description: Default topology query timeout when the context has no deadline.

update_is_pushed.batch.size.description: Batch size for marking pushed records during upstream reconciliation.

upstream.client.cache.view-columns.durat.description: Cache duration for upstream view-column client lookups.

upstream.pull_playbook_actions.description: Schedule playbook action upstream pull jobs.

upstream.summary.fkerror_id_count.description: Foreign-key error IDs included in upstream reconciliation summaries.

view.http.body.max_size_bytes.description: Maximum HTTP response body size for HTTP data queries.

view.refresh.max-timeout.description: Maximum timeout for asynchronous view refreshes.

views.disable.description: UI feature flag: set value to the string true to hide or disable custom view UI surfaces.

^[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+\\.batchSize$.description: Batch size for an async event consumer.

^[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+\\.(debug|trace)$.description: Enable debug or trace logging for an async event consumer.

^log\\.color\\.[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+$.description: Color setting for a named logger.

^log\\.caller\\.[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+$.description: Caller setting for a named logger.

^log\\.level\\.[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+$.description: Named logger or feature log level.

^log\\.time\\.format\\.[A-Za-z0-9_.-]+$.description: Timestamp format for a named logger.

^postgres\\.session\\..+$.description: PostgreSQL transaction-local setting applied by duty.ApplySessionProperties.

^scraper\\.[^.]+\\.schedule\\.min$.description: Minimum schedule interval for a scraper type.

^scraper\\.[^.]+\\.(azure\\.devops\\.inc.description: Global or per-scrape-config ScrapeContext boolean property.

^time_interval\\..+$.description: JSON encoded alertmanager-style time interval consumed by commons properties helpers.

oneOf.description: Duration as a numeric value accepted by the embedding configuration layer.
